name: Match Picture To Words 3D
description: Can you match the picture to the right word? Drag each image and connect it to its correct word; apple, ant, airplane and more! A fun and educational game for kids to learn new vocabulary while playing. Simple drag-and-drop controls, colorful characters, and multiple difficulty levels make it perfect for little learners. Train your memory, boost your word skills, and have a blast doing it!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
